mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.order_no AS orderNo, c.user_id AS userId, c.doctor_id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, d.avatar AS doctorAvatar, d.title AS doctorTitle, dt.name AS departmentName, h.name AS hospitalName, c.patient_name AS patientName, c.patient_phone AS patientPhone, c.disease_desc AS diseaseDesc, c.appointment_time AS appointmentTime, c.duration, c.amount, c.status, c.pay_time AS payTime, c.create_time AS createTime, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.order_type = 2 AND r.order_id = c.id AND r.user_id = c.user_id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReviewed FROM t_consult c LEFT JOIN t_doctor d ON c.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id LEFT JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id WHERE c.order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
